moments.title: Wimbledon Kicks Off!
moments.blurb: The world's most prestigious tennis tournament, Wimbledon, begins today at the All England Club in London, running for two weeks until July 12th.

angles.name: Centre Court buzz
angles.copy: Game, Set, Match! Wimbledon 2026 is officially underway in SW19. Who are you backing for the Gentlemen's and Ladies' Singles titles this year?

angles.name: Strawberries & Cream
angles.copy: It's not truly summer until Wimbledon starts! Get ready for two weeks of incredible tennis, Pimm's, and of course, mountains of strawberries and cream.

moments.title: Happy 48th, Nicole Scherzinger!
moments.blurb: Pop sensation and former Pussycat Dolls lead singer Nicole Scherzinger celebrates her 48th birthday today, June 29th.

angles.name: Pussycat Dolls tribute
angles.copy: Don't Cha wish it was your birthday? Happy 48th to the incredible Nicole Scherzinger, lead voice of the Pussycat Dolls! What's your favourite Pussycat Dolls track?

angles.name: Solo career & TV
angles.copy: From chart-topping hits to judging panels, Nicole Scherzinger turns 48 today! Sending birthday love to the multi-talented star.

moments.title: The Open Championship Final Qualifying
moments.blurb: Golfers will compete in Final Qualifying events for The 154th Open Championship on June 30th at four locations across the UK, ahead of the main tournament in July.

angles.name: Last chance saloon
angles.copy: The tension is building! Tomorrow sees golfers battle it out in Final Qualifying for The Open Championship. Who will snatch those coveted spots for Royal Birkdale?

angles.name: Road to Birkdale
angles.copy: Only the best will make it. Final Qualifying for The Open Championship takes place tomorrow, with dreams of lifting the Claret Jug on the line.

moments.title: Happy 55th, Missy Elliott!
moments.blurb: Groundbreaking rapper, singer, songwriter, and producer Missy Elliott celebrates her 55th birthday on July 1st.

angles.name: Iconic rapper
angles.copy: Get Ur Freak On! Wishing a huge happy 55th birthday to the one and only Missy Elliott. A true pioneer in music!

angles.name: Producer & artist
angles.copy: From 'Supa Dupa Fly' to the Songwriters Hall of Fame, Missy Elliott turns 55 tomorrow! What's your favourite track from the legendary artist?

moments.title: Happy 40th, Lindsay Lohan!
moments.blurb: Actress and singer Lindsay Lohan, known for 'Mean Girls' and her pop hits, turns 40 on July 2nd.

angles.name: Mean Girls icon
angles.copy: On July 2nd, we wear pink! Happy 40th birthday to the iconic Lindsay Lohan. What's your favourite of her movies or songs?

angles.name: Music & movie star
angles.copy: From 'The Parent Trap' to pop anthems, wishing a very happy 40th to Lindsay Lohan! Celebrate her big day with some classic 00s tracks.

moments.title: Happy 31st, Post Malone!
moments.blurb: Grammy-nominated artist Post Malone, known for blending genres from hip-hop to rock, celebrates his 31st birthday on July 4th.

angles.name: Genre-bending star
angles.copy: Feeling 'Better Now' because it's Post Malone's 31st birthday on July 4th! What's your favourite Posty track to blast?

angles.name: Happy Bday Posty
angles.copy: Cheers to Post Malone turning 31 on the 4th of July! From 'Circles' to his latest ventures, he keeps us hooked.

moments.title: Happy 51st, 50 Cent!
moments.blurb: Multi-platinum selling rapper, actor, and businessman 50 Cent celebrates his 51st birthday on July 6th.

angles.name: Hip-hop mogul
angles.copy: Go Shorty, It's Ya Birthday! Wishing a huge happy 51st to the legendary 50 Cent on July 6th. What's your top track from the G-Unit boss?

angles.name: Powerhouse career
angles.copy: From 'Get Rich or Die Tryin'' to TV's 'Power', 50 Cent turns 51 on Monday! A true force in music and entertainment.

moments.title: Happy 86th, Ringo Starr!
moments.blurb: The legendary drummer for The Beatles, Ringo Starr, celebrates his 86th birthday on July 7th.

angles.name: Beatles legend
angles.copy: Peace and Love! Sending the happiest of 86th birthday wishes to the one and only Ringo Starr on July 7th. What's your favourite Beatles track featuring Ringo?

angles.name: Drummer icon
angles.copy: Would you like 'With a Little Help From My Friends' to celebrate Ringo Starr's 86th birthday on Tuesday? The iconic drummer still brings the joy!

moments.title: Happy 62nd, Courtney Love!
moments.blurb: Rock icon, singer-songwriter, and frontwoman of Hole, Courtney Love, celebrates her 62nd birthday on July 9th.

angles.name: Grunge Queen
angles.copy: Happy 62nd birthday to the incomparable Courtney Love on July 9th! The Hole frontwoman continues to inspire generations of rock fans.

angles.name: Rock icon
angles.copy: Celebrating the enduring legacy of Courtney Love, who turns 62 on Thursday. What's your favourite Hole anthem or solo track?
